name: ChatGPT (Codex)
description_en: Use a ChatGPT Plus/Pro subscription for title parsing via the Codex device-flow login.
description_zh: 通过 Codex device flow 登录，用 ChatGPT Plus/Pro 订阅解析标题。
risk_notice_en: ChatGPT subscription credentials are scoped to the official Codex client; third-party use is unsanctioned and may be blocked. Use at your own risk.
risk_notice_zh: ChatGPT 订阅凭据被限定到官方 Codex 客户端，第三方使用未获许可、可能被封锁。请自担风险。
